languages.text: "Никто за пределами Камеры не должен узнать о том, что Патент исчез, пока я не найду способ вернуть его".
"No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."
languages.original_text: "Никто за пределами Камеры не должен узнать о том, что Патент исчез, пока я не найду способ вернуть его".

traits.locale_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."
"No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."
"No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."
"No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."
"No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

languages.text: “在我找到办法夺回贸易授状之前，贸易授状失踪的消息绝不可走漏到这间密室之外。”
languages.original_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

traits.locale_text: “在我找到办法夺回贸易授状之前，贸易授状失踪的消息绝不可走漏到这间密室之外。”

languages.text: «Nadie que no esté en esta sala debe saber que la Patente ha desaparecido hasta que encuentre la forma de recuperarla».
languages.original_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

traits.locale_text: «Nadie que no esté en esta sala debe saber que la Patente ha desaparecido hasta que encuentre la forma de recuperarla».

languages.text: Personne en dehors de ces murs ne doit savoir que la lettre a disparu, pas avant que je trouve un moyen de la récupérer. »
languages.original_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

traits.locale_text: Personne en dehors de ces murs ne doit savoir que la lettre a disparu, pas avant que je trouve un moyen de la récupérer. »

languages.text: "Ben onu geri almanın bir yolunu bulana dek bu odanın dışındaki hiç kimse, Ruhsatname'nin ortadan kaybolduğunu öğrenmemeli."
languages.original_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

traits.locale_text: "Ben onu geri almanın bir yolunu bulana dek bu odanın dışındaki hiç kimse, Ruhsatname'nin ortadan kaybolduğunu öğrenmemeli."

languages.text: "Niemand außerhalb dieser Kammer darf erfahren, dass der Handelsbrief verschwunden ist, bis ich weiß, wie wir ihn zurückholen können."
languages.original_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

traits.locale_text: "Niemand außerhalb dieser Kammer darf erfahren, dass der Handelsbrief verschwunden ist, bis ich weiß, wie wir ihn zurückholen können."

languages.text: 「この議事堂の外では、この令状が消えたことを、私がそれを取り戻す方法を見つけるまで、誰も知ることはできない」
languages.original_text: "No one outside this Chamber must learn that the Warrant has vanished until I find a way to recover it."

traits.locale_text: 「この議事堂の外では、この令状が消えたことを、私がそれを取り戻す方法を見つけるまで、誰も知ることはできない」
